company_overview: NovaTech is a leading SaaS platform founded in 2018, serving over 10,000 customers worldwide with cloud-based solutions for project management, analytics, and automation.
pricing_free: Free plan: Basic features with limited usage, no cost.
pricing_starter: Starter plan: £8/month for small teams with advanced features.
pricing_business: Business plan: £25/month for growing businesses with premium support.
pricing_enterprise: Enterprise plan: Custom pricing for large organizations with dedicated resources.
billing_monthly: Billing occurs monthly based on the selected plan.
billing_annual: Billing occurs annually based on the selected plan.
billing_payment_methods: Payments processed securely via credit card or bank transfer.
billing_refund_policy: 14-day refund policy for new subscriptions. Refunds issued within 5-7 business days.
password_reset: To reset password: Click 'Forgot Password', enter email, check for reset link, follow to set new password.
mobile_support: Mobile apps for iOS and Android with offline capabilities.
issue_login: Login failures: Check internet and credentials.
issue_sync: Data sync problems: Clear cache and restart app.
issue_access: Feature access errors: Verify plan limits.
troubleshooting_help: Visit help center or contact support for troubleshooting.
escalation_senior: Escalate to senior support for unresolved issues after 48 hours.
escalation_management: Escalate to management for legal matters or disputes.
escalation_billing: Automatically escalate billing issues over £500 to finance team.
privacy_encryption: Data encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_no_sale: Does not sell personal data to third parties.
privacy_data_requests: Users can request data deletion or export via account settings.
tone_clear: Use clear language and avoid jargon.
tone_prompt: Respond promptly and follow up on unresolved issues.
cs_programming: Core skills include Computer Science & Programming fundamentals.
cs_languages: Programming languages: Python, Java, C fundamentals.
math_logic: Mathematics & Logic: Boolean Algebra, Logic Gates.
financial_banking: Banking & Payments: Savings accounts, fixed deposits, recurring deposits.
financial_insurance: Insurance: Life insurance vs health insurance.
financial_taxes: Taxes: Basics of income tax slabs.
financial_planning: Financial Planning: Short-term vs long-term goals.
financial_entrepreneurship: Entrepreneurship Basics: Profit, loss, and break-even.
personal_communication: Communication skills for different age groups.
